text.title: continuous-delivery Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for continuous-delivery as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents try to answer implementation questions from this index alone and produce hand-wavy bullets.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a child-file read; cd-basics and cd-pipelines contain the detail.

failure-mode.description: Quoting the matrix while skipping prerequisites in cd-basics leads teams to adopt CD without CI or test coverage in place.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always reference cd-basics prerequisites before recommending CD adoption.

failure-mode.description: Continuous Deployment prompts trigger agents to enable auto-deploy on services that lack canary analysis or rollback.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Block auto-deploy until the prerequisites in cd-basics are checked off.

failure-mode.description: Cross-link rot: agents follow paths to non-existent neighbors.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Validate paths with the ls commands in the Verify section before writing the response.

failure-mode.description: Quoting DORA elite numbers as immediate targets for a team that has not instrumented deploys.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Demand fourkeys / Sleuth / LinearB instrumentation be present (or planned) before referencing the elite tier.
